MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JOHN WHITE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD DEFENDANT'S STATUS AS AN EMPLOYEE AND TO CLARIFY WHICH CAUSE OF ACTION PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO STATE AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THAT CAPACITY. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)
